_comment: Insufficient pattern-test window fixture. Only 10 SCORED cycles in the trailing-28 window → detectWeeklyPattern guards at < 14 (N_WEAK_FLOOR) and returns pattern.kind='no_pattern', reason='insufficient_window_days'. Confidence tier is 'weak' over the trailing-28 window (10 < 20 with coverage 35.7%; 10 ≥ 10 minRequired → not insufficient at the daily/confidence layer because confidenceFromCounts(10, 28) gives weak — but pattern.ts has its own 14-day floor that's stricter). candidate_results=[] because detection short-circuits before per-candidate loop runs.
name: weekly-no-pattern-insufficient-window
